name: mostGetHWInfo
title: mostGetHWInfo
syntax: long mostGetHWInfo(long channel, long infoID); // form 1
long mostGetHWInfo(long channel, long infoID, char infostring[], long buffersize); // form 2
description: Provides information about the MOST interface used.

parameters.name: kMostHWInfo_Type = 0
parameters.description: Interface type: 1: VN2600/VN26102: OptoLyzer3: —4: OptoLyzer G2 3150o5: VN26406: OptoLyzer G2 3050e7: —8: OptoLyzer MOCCA compact 50e9: Logger10: OptoLyzer MOCCA compact 150c

parameters.name: kMostHWInfo_SyncMode = 3
parameters.description: Synchronization mode: 0: off1: SW Sync active2: HW Sync active (bus interface on <channel> is Sync Master)3: HW Sync active (bus interface on <channel> is Sync Slave)

parameters.name: kMostHWInfo_SyncStatus = 4
parameters.description: Synchronization status: 0: HW Sync not active1: HW Sync active2: HW Sync works correctly

parameters.name: infostring
parameters.description: Target buffer to which text information is copied.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
